svg.title: ISO 20022 payment message pipeline architecture
svg.desc: A three-tier pipeline: test-data generation, secure Kafka streaming with four-step validation, and reconciliation and analytics reporting.
svg.text: End-to-end generation, cryptographically secure streaming, and automated reconciliation & analytics

g.text: Synthetic pain.001–018 messages, schema-validated at source
Signed, verified, validated, rule-checked, and de-duplicated in flight
Single source of truth, audit-ready reconciliation and business insight
